title: Performance with bitmap functions
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the situation
After upgrading to ClickHouse v24.8.14.39, I encountered execution failures when executing test cases. This issue seems to be related to the new query analyzer and bitmap function introduced in v24.3, which slowed down parsing in some scenarios.
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
24.8.14.39
### How to reproduce
1. Create test table:
```sql
CREATE TABLE id_table (
id UInt64
) ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY id;
```
```sql
CREATE TABLE bitmap_table (
total UInt64,
id_bit AggregateFunction(groupBitmap, UInt64),
) ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY total;
```
2. Insert data:
```sql
INSERT INTO id_table
SELECT number + 1 AS id
FROM numbers(50000000);
```
```sql
INSERT INTO bitmap_table
SELECT 1000000 as total, id_bit FROM (
SELECT groupBitmapState(rand64() % toUInt64(80000000)) as id_bit from numbers(1000000)
)
INSERT INTO bitmap_table
SELECT 6000000 as total, id_bit FROM (
SELECT groupBitmapState(rand64() % toUInt64(80000000)) as id_bit from numbers(6000000)
)
```
3.Execute query:
```sql
SELECT
bitmapCardinality(
(
SELECT
groupBitmapState(toUInt64OrDefault(id)) AS id_bitmap
FROM
id_table
WHERE
(
bitmapContains(
(
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id BIGINT, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (total DOUBLE PRECISION, id_bit BITMAP, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table1 SELECT number AS id, CAST(number AS VARCHAR) AS value, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM generate_series(1, 100000);
INSERT INTO test_table2 SELECT 1.5 AS total, BITMAP_AGG(rand() % 1000) AS id_bit, NULL AS description FROM generate_series(1, 100);
SELECT BITMAP_COUNT(id_bit) FROM test_table2 WHERE total > 1.0;
key_bug_features: New query analyzer and bitmap function performance issue
